result_summary.description: A circular outline containing three small filled dots arranged in a triangular face pattern (two eyes on top, one mouth below).
A circle outline containing two small filled dots arranged horizontally, resembling a simple minimalist face or face-like icon. Partial digit-like shapes appear on either side of the circle.
Stylized lettering showing 'r' on the left, a circle with three dots (forming a face) in the middle, and a '1' or partial character on the right. Appears to be part of a logo or stylized text.
A circle containing three dots arranged like a simple face: one dot at the top and two dots at the bottom, resembling eyes and a mouth.
A black circle containing four black dots arranged in a 2x2 square pattern, resembling the face of a die showing 4
A simple stick figure face consisting of a circle outline with two dots (eyes) and a smaller dot or mark (mouth) inside, drawn in a childlike or minimalist style.
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern, resembling a simple face
A simple hand-drawn style face: a circle containing two dots (eyes) and a smaller dot below (mouth), flanked on both sides by short vertical lines resembling brackets or whiskers.
A circle containing three dots: two dots on top resembling eyes and one dot below resembling a mouth, creating a simple face-like figure.
A circle outline containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face.

A composite runic glyph consisting of a central circle containing four small dots arranged in two pairs, flanked on left and right by angular bracket-like strokes resembling 'less-than' and 'greater-than' signs.
A circular face with two eyes and an open mouth (three dots), flanked by partial letter shapes on either side.
A hand-drawn circle containing two dot-like eyes and a small mark below them, resembling a simple face or emoticon.
